LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER AND THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT SUBMITTED BY THE MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Unopposed Motion And Unopposed Motion For Order Approving Derivative Settlement And Awarding Attys Fees Expenses And Incentive Award
Off Calendar Oct-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY KASMER, DERIVATIVELY, ON BEHALF OF IMMERSION CORPORATION's Motion For Order Approving Derivative Settlement And Awarding Attorneys Fees, Expenses And Incentive Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The court will sign the proposed order and the proposed judgment submitted by the moving party. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
